NAME: Remap Header
COMMENTS: Shown when the player tries to remap in input in the Settings Menu

NAME: Remap Message
TEXT: Press any button to remap this Input.
COMMENTS: Shown when the player tries to remap in input in the Settings Menu

NAME: Clear Header
COMMENTS: Shown when the player tries to remap in input in the Settings Menu

NAME: Clear Message
TEXT: Are you sure you want to clear this input?
COMMENTS: Shown when the player tries to remap in input in the Settings Menu

NAME: Title Screen Header
COMMENTS: Shown when the player attempts to return to the title screen.

NAME: Title Screen Message
COMMENTS: Shown when the player attempts to return to the title screen.

NAME: Quit Game Header
COMMENTS: Shown when the player attempts to close the application.

NAME: Quit Game Message
COMMENTS: Shown when the player attempts to close the application.

NAME: Save Header
COMMENTS: Shown when the player attempts to save on the Save Menu

NAME: Save Message
TEXT: You will overwrite any data stored at this slot.
COMMENTS: Shown when the player attempts to save on the Save Menu

NAME: Delete Save Header
TEXT: Delete save data from this slot?
COMMENTS: Shown when the player attempts to delete a save on the Save Menu

NAME: Delete Save Message
COMMENTS: Shown when the player attempts to delete a save on the Save Menu

NAME: Load Save Header
TEXT: Load saved data from this slot?
COMMENTS: Shown when the player attempts to load a save on the Save Menu

NAME: Load Save Message
COMMENTS: Shown when the player attempts to load a save on the Save Menu

NAME: Argument Start Header
COMMENTS: Shown when the player is about to start an ARGUMENT during an investigation

NAME: Argument Start Message
COMMENTS: Shown when the player is about to start an ARGUMENT during an investigation

NAME: Argument No Profile
COMMENTS: Shown when the player is about to start an ARGUMENT during an investigation. This message is added when the player hasn't completed the opponent's psychological profile.

NAME: Argument Fail Header
COMMENTS: Shown when the player fails an Argument against an opponent

NAME: Argument Fail Message
TEXT: You failed to persuade your opponent...
COMMENTS: Shown when the player fails an Argument against an opponent

NAME: Final Fail Header
COMMENTS: Shown when the player fails the final Argument against the Empress of Discord.

NAME: Final Fail Message
TEXT: Your soul has been claimed by the Abyss...
COMMENTS: Shown when the player fails the final Argument against the Empress of Discord.

NAME: Delete Steam Header
COMMENTS: Shown when the player tries to delete a Steam Workshop Item.

NAME: Act Break Header
COMMENTS: Shown when the game moves to the next session of a Case and prompts the player to save.

NAME: Act Break Message
TEXT: Would you like to save your progress?
COMMENTS: Shown when the game moves to the next session of a Case and prompts the player to save.

NAME: New Game Header
COMMENTS: Shown when the player attempts to start a Case from a fresh save file.

NAME: New Game Message
COMMENTS: Shown when the player attempts to start a Case from a fresh save file.

NAME: Demo Episode Header
COMMENTS: Shown in the demo when the player attempts to start Cases 2-5.

NAME: Demo Episode Message
TEXT: You must purchase the full game to play this episode.
COMMENTS: Shown in the demo when the player attempts to start Cases 2-5.
